arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm defender’s return from injury ahead of crucial Real Sociedad fixture
arts.sum: Less than 24 hours after their disappointing Copa del Rey draw against Atletico Madrid, Barcelona have received some much-needed good news in the form of a return from injury for Andreas Christensen. Christensen, who has been linked with a summer move over the last few months, has not played since the opening day of the […] The post Barcelona confirm defender’s return from injury ahead of crucial Real Sociedad fixture appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Carlo Ancelotti makes feelings clear on futures of Endrick, Arda Guler amid exit talk
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti insists that both Endrick and Arda Guler are in his long-term plans amid the recent speculation surrounding their futures.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star ‘won’t play for the club again’ amid fresh injury setback
arts.sum: A somewhat forgotten member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has this week suffered a fresh blow on the injury front. The player in question? Jesús…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid visit Liverpool for SECOND signing as Trent ‘OBSESSION’ revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid are “obsessed” with Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold, while Los Blancos are similarly interested in signing Everton centre-back Jarrad Branthwaite. Real Madrid are ready to do everything to sign Branthwaite’s Liverpool neighbour Trent Alexander-Arnold, Fabrizio Romano reports.

arts.ttl: Who is set to miss Real Madrid’s Copa del Rey clash against Real Sociedad tonight?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to take on Real Sociedad tonight at the Reale Arena in San Sebastián in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semi final. Whoever advances…

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid outspend Real Madrid as transfer figures for last decade are revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have the image of the big-spending and all-conquering multi-national giant in football, but President Florentino Perez has more recently defined their transfer strategy by relative austerity. Limiting Los Blancos to just one galactico signing per summer, they only bring in experienced players as free agents these days too. arts.ttl: Real Madrid without three key players for Copa del Rey semi-final
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti's Real Madrid are heading to San Sebastian to take on Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe hands Real Madrid Copa Del Rey blow after TOOTH removal rules star man out

arts.ttl: Antony free to face Real Madrid after appeal
arts.sum: Winger Antony will be available for Real Betis' La Liga match against Real Madrid on Saturday after winning an appeal against a red card.
